title: Contact & Advice | Get Support Today - Contact Now — Ian Byrne MP - Working for West Derby
meta_description: Contact Ian Byrne MP for West Derby for community support, legal advice, and local campaign information. Reach out for assistance and resources in Liverpool West Derby.
headings: h3: For people living in Liverpool West Derby
h3: Learn more about the Right To Food UK Commission
text_excerpt: Contact & Advice | Get Support Today - Contact Now — Ian Byrne MP - Working for West Derby 0 Skip to Content Ian Byrne MP - Working for West Derby About Contact & Advice Your Page Moss West Derby Centre for Social Justice Right To Food UK Commission Right To Food Campaign Hillsborough Law Now Campaign 'The Real Truth' Legacy Project Sign Up Open Menu Close Menu Ian Byrne MP - Working for West Derby About Contact & Advice Your Page Moss West Derby Centre for Social Justice Right To Food UK Commission Right To Food Campaign Hillsborough Law Now Campaign 'The Real Truth' Legacy Project Sign Up Open Menu Close Menu About Contact & Advice Your Page Moss West Derby Centre for Social Justice Right To Food UK Commission Right To Food Campaign Hillsborough Law Now Campaign 'The Real Truth' Legacy Project Sign Up Contact & Advice Contacting Ian Me and my team are here to help. Please use the contact details listed to get in touch. Due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I can only take up casework on behalf of Liverpool West Derby constituents. You can check if I am your MP on the Parliament website and by using this link: https://members.parliament.uk/members/commons email: ian.byrne.mp@parliament.uk phone: 0151 222 2345 write to: Ian Byrne, 545 West Derby Road, L13 8AA in person: please contact the office for details of the MP surgeries I hold around the constituency Vauxhall Law Centre My office and The Vauxhall Law Centre are working together to offer an advice service to all people living in the Liverpool West Derby Constituency. Contact Vauxhall Law Centre at: Phone: 0151 360 7777 Email: advice@vauxhalllawcentre.org.uk Vauxhall Law Centre provides advice on all Benefit and Debt issues and will be able to provide you with advice on a wide range of issues such as: Claiming Personal Independence Payments for people who are sick and people with disabilities Universal Credit Claims, Housing Benefit, Debt and a whole range of further advice Useful Information For people living in Liverpool West Derby Special Educational Needs Pathways Pathways to support understanding of the law relating to Special Educational Needs. These pathways deal with problems related to assessing special educational needs and obtaining educational, health and social care provision. These pathways are now maintained by the Law Clinic at the University of Liverpool with the support of students who study the law relating to children with Special Educational Needs as part of their degree. They are intended as a support tool. https://www.sendecisions.org.uk/ General Coronavirus advice and support For the latest advice and guidance on Coronavirus restrictions, testing advice, Track and Trace support payments, help for carers and help for businesses please visit the Liverpool City Council website using the following link: https://liverpool.gov.uk/communities-and-safety/emergency-planning/coronavirus/ Struggling to make ends meet - including food and fuel If you need money to buy food, sanitary products, essential items for children, essential clothing or cover fuel costs. If you need white goods, furniture or help to set up home after suffering an emergency or crisis. Call the Mayoral Hardship Fund and Liverpool Citizens Support Scheme on free phone 0800 456 1523 (lines are open from 8am to 6pm, Monday to Friday) Find your nearest foodbank using the following link: https://liverpool.gov.uk/foodbanks Homeless, at risk of homelessness or in rent arrears Liverpool City Council Housing Options provides help and advice is you are homeless or threatened with homelessness. Call free on 0800 731 6844 Their website also provides further information on the following link: https://liverpool.gov.uk/housing/homeless-or-at-risk/ Benefit and Debt issues - including Universal Credit, Housing Benefit, Personal Independence Payments Ian Byrne MP’s Office and The Vauxhall Law Centre are working together to offer an advice service to all people living in the Liverpool West Derby Const
